A hyper-photorealistic, extreme wide-angle shot of a colossal, bioluminescent cybernetic octopus wearing a frayed Victorian top hat, gracefully pouring glowing, nebulous tea in a zero-gravity botanical greenhouse. The greenhouse is orbiting a dying red dwarf star, which is intensely visible through massive, partially shattered geodesic glass panes. The octopus features intricate brass clockwork gears clearly visible beneath transparent, iridescent silicone skin. One mechanical tentacle holds an etched obsidian teacup while the tea spills, frozen in mid-air, forming miniature swirling galaxies. Another tentacle grasps a melting brass pocket watch that is actively shattering into microscopic, floating geometric prisms. The zero-gravity environment is choked with translucent crystalline ferns and giant floating neon-cyan lotus flowers. Cinematic lighting: harsh volumetric god-rays from the red star clash with soft magenta rim lighting from the cyborg's internal bioluminescence. Render specifics: 8k resolution, macro-level texture on the brass and shattered glass, intense subsurface scattering on the biological tentacles, depth of field with the background foliage slightly blurred (f/1.8 lens effect), ray-traced reflections, masterpiece.
